title: Domix's Wynncraft Overhaul
description: Domix's Wynncraft Overhaul is a resource pack that iams to improve your visual experience on the MMORPG minecraft server Wynncraft
body:
![Simple Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2917d72753e9bf3993e51acbe58a0ae84e4e925.png)

![Wynncraft Overhaul Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce4064f21a23b79751b419a0ebad957b282ba932.png)

**Domix's Wynncraft Overhaul** is a resource pack that aims to improve your visual experience on the MMORPG minecraft server **Wynncraft**

---

⚠️ ***Please remeber that everything in this pack is a subject to change*** ⚠️

---

- Resource pack is meant for **[Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/)**
- Requires **[Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home)**
- If you want to use **fabric** with this resource pack you have to download these mods **[Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)**, **[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**, **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**, **[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

![Simple Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2917d72753e9bf3993e51acbe58a0ae84e4e925.png)

Follow me on **Twitter** to see **sneak peeks** and get information about upcoming updates, or join my **Discord** server :)

[![Twitter Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eda33390387eafed180242274efd33786aa1af3.png)](https://twitter.com/DomixCZE)

[![Discord Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52a693864420160594920d376c427418c7b937c7.png)](https://discord.gg/3Cx2NHdpef)

[![Kofi Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f9f59d74a4805a4ddcf11141f068d1e2ba9c154.png)](https://ko-fi.com/domixcze)
